title: CI/CD Pipelines: Build/Test/Lint, Contract Deploy, SCA/SAST, Image Signing, Environment Promotion
description: Create GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines for the full platform. CI covers: Python lint/type-check/test, frontend lint/test/build, smart contract compile/test/static analysis, SCA dependency scanning (block High/Critical CVEs). CD covers: build images + SBOM + cosign signing, auto-deploy to dev on merge, manual approval for staging/prod, smoke tests post-deploy. Smart contract deployment pipeline with ABI/address artifact publishing and atomic Discovery config update.
objectives: CI pipeline for Python services (ruff lint, mypy type-check, pytest with coverage gate)
CI pipeline for React frontend (ESLint, TypeScript tsc, Vitest, Vite build)
CI pipeline for smart contracts (Hardhat compile, test, Slither static analysis)
SCA scanning for Python (pip-audit) and Node (npm audit) — block High/Critical CVEs
CD pipeline: Docker build + syft SBOM + cosign sign + push to registry
CD deploy stages: dev (auto), staging (approval), prod (two-person approval) + smoke tests
Contract deploy pipeline with approval gates and ABI/address artifact publishing

steps.title: Python CI workflow
steps.detail: File: `.github/workflows/ci-python.yml`. Triggers: pull_request targeting main, push to main. Jobs: `lint` (runs on ubuntu-latest, Python 3.12): `pip install ruff mypy` → `ruff check libs/ services/` → `mypy libs/ services/ --ignore-missing-imports --strict` (fail on error). `test`: `pip install -r requirements-test.lock` → `pytest tests/ --cov=libs --cov=services --cov-fail-under=80 --cov-report=xml -x`. Upload coverage XML to Codecov. `sca-python`: `pip install pip-audit` → `pip-audit -r requirements.lock --format=json --output=pip-audit.json` → parse JSON and fail if any vulnerability severity HIGH or CRITICAL (`jq '.vulnerabilities[] | select(.severity == "HIGH" or .severity == "CRITICAL") | error' pip-audit.json`). Upload pip-audit.json as artifact.

steps.title: Frontend CI workflow
steps.detail: File: `.github/workflows/ci-frontend.yml`. Jobs: `lint-typecheck`: `npm ci` → `npx eslint src/ --max-warnings 0` → `npx tsc --noEmit` (TypeScript type-only compilation, no output). `test`: `npx vitest run --coverage --coverage.provider=v8 --coverage.thresholds.lines=80`. `build`: `npm run build` (Vite) → verify `dist/` directory contains `index.html` and at least one `.js` bundle. `sca-node`: `npm audit --audit-level high` — exits non-zero if HIGH or CRITICAL found (use `--json` flag for machine-readable output). Upload build artifact (`dist/`) for use in Docker build job. Set `NODE_ENV=production` for build step.

steps.title: Smart contract CI workflow
steps.detail: File: `.github/workflows/ci-contracts.yml`. Jobs: `compile-test`: `npm ci` → `npx hardhat compile` → `npx hardhat test` (runs all test files in `test/`). Fail if any test fails or compilation error. `coverage`: `npx hardhat coverage --solcoverjs .solcover.js` — fail if branch coverage < 90%. `slither-analysis`: Install Slither: `pip install slither-analyzer`. Run `slither contracts/ --json slither-output.json`. Post-process: fail CI on any HIGH or CRITICAL (impact: High, confidence: High) finding. Upload slither-output.json as artifact. `mythril-analysis` (optional, slow): run only on schedule (weekly) not on every PR.

steps.title: Docker build and image signing pipeline
steps.detail: File: `.github/workflows/cd-build.yml`. Triggers: push to main (after CI passes). Jobs: `build-discovery`: `docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --cache-from type=gha --cache-to type=gha,mode=max --tag $REGISTRY/discovery:$SHA -f infra/docker/discovery/Dockerfile --push .`. `sbom-sign-discovery`: `syft $REGISTRY/discovery:$SHA -o cyclonedx-json > sbom-discovery.json`. `cosign sign --yes $REGISTRY/discovery@$(docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' $REGISTRY/discovery:$SHA)`. Upload sbom-discovery.json artifact. Repeat for sentinel and discovery-ui. Require `id-token: write` permission (for OIDC cosign keyless signing). After all builds: tag images as `:dev` for auto-deploy.

steps.title: CD pipeline — dev auto-deploy
steps.detail: File: `.github/workflows/cd-deploy-dev.yml`. Triggers: workflow_run on `cd-build.yml` completed with success. Job: `deploy-dev`: checkout → configure kubectl (dev cluster kubeconfig in secret `KUBECONFIG_DEV`). Verify images: `cosign verify --certificate-identity-regexp=<github_actions_url> --certificate-oidc-issuer=https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com $IMAGE_DIGEST`. Deploy: `helm upgrade --install sentinel-discovery infra/helm/discovery -f infra/helm/discovery/values-dev.yaml --set image.tag=$SHA --wait --timeout=5m`. `helm upgrade --install sentinel-node infra/helm/sentinel -f infra/helm/sentinel/values-dev.yaml --set image.tag=$SHA --wait --timeout=5m`. After deploy: run smoke tests (see step 7).

steps.title: CD pipeline — staging and prod approval gates
steps.detail: File: `.github/workflows/cd-deploy-staging.yml`. Uses GitHub Actions `environment: staging` with required reviewers (1 reviewer). On approval: deploy with `values-staging.yaml`. After deploy: run extended smoke tests (5m timeout). File: `.github/workflows/cd-deploy-prod.yml`. Uses `environment: production` with required reviewers (2 reviewers — two-person rule). Gate: prod deploy ONLY from tags matching `v*.*.*` (not from SHA directly). Steps: cosign verify → helm upgrade (prod values) → wait rollout → smoke tests. On failure: automatic rollback: `helm rollback sentinel-discovery` and `helm rollback sentinel-node`. Rollback also triggers PagerDuty alert.

steps.title: Smoke tests post-deploy
steps.detail: File: `tests/smoke/smoke_test.sh`. Script run after each Helm deploy. Tests: (1) `curl -sf $DISCOVERY_URL/health/ready` returns 200. (2) `curl -sf $DISCOVERY_URL/api/v1/services` returns 200 with JSON array. (3) Sentinel health: `curl -sf $SENTINEL_URL/api/v1/health/ready` returns 200 with `did_initialized: true`. (4) Sentinel metrics: `curl -sf $SENTINEL_URL/metrics` returns 200 with `sentinel_inbound_requests_total` in body. (5) Discovery metrics: `curl -sf $DISCOVERY_URL/metrics` returns 200. Each check retried up to 5× with 10s sleep. Fail workflow if any check fails after retries. Produce JUnit XML report for GitHub Actions test summary.

steps.title: Smart contract deployment pipeline
steps.detail: File: `.github/workflows/cd-contracts.yml`. Triggers: ONLY from tags `contract-v*.*.*`. Environment: `contract-deploy` (requires 2 approvers — separate from app deploy). Steps: compile → run tests one final time → deploy to Sepolia: `npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia`. Capture deployed addresses from stdout. Publish addresses as artifact (`contract-addresses-$TAG.json`). Update Discovery Service config: POST to Discovery API with new `blockchain_config.contract_addresses` (requires admin JWT). Verify: query each contract on-chain to confirm deployment. Emit Slack notification with Etherscan links. Never auto-deploy contracts — always requires manual tag + approval.

files..github/workflows/cd-build.yml: Docker build + SBOM + cosign sign pipeline
files..github/workflows/cd-contracts.yml: Contract deploy pipeline with approval gates

security_constraints: KUBECONFIG secrets: use short-lived Kubernetes ServiceAccount tokens (not long-lived kubeconfig files) via GitHub Apps OIDC federation where possible
Registry credentials: use OIDC federation to ECR/GCR rather than static credentials stored in CI secrets
SCA gate: block merge if pip-audit or npm audit finds HIGH or CRITICAL — no override without security team approval logged in PR comment
Secrets in CI: `${{ secrets.X }}` only — never hardcoded. Enforce via GitLeaks pre-commit hook (add to CI as `gitleaks detect --source .`)
Contract deploy: only from signed tags — prevents accidental deploy from branch or unreviewed commit
Prod deployment logs retained 90 days (GitHub Actions log retention configuration)
acceptance_criteria: CI Python pipeline passes on clean main branch (lint, mypy, pytest, pip-audit all green)
CI blocks merge when HIGH CVE introduced (verified by adding a known-vulnerable package in test branch)
Docker images built, SBOM generated, cosign verify succeeds in deploy pipeline
Dev auto-deploy completes within 10 minutes of merge to main
Staging deploy requires manual approval — deploy blocked until reviewer approves in GitHub UI
Prod deploy requires 2 approvals and only succeeds from version-tagged commit
Rollback executes automatically within 2 minutes of failed smoke tests
Smart contract pipeline requires separate approval and posts Etherscan links to Slack on success
